query:
WITH deleted_client_record AS (
                    DELETE FROM qs_client_record
                    WHERE client_id = $1
                    RETURNING client_id, user_id
                )
                INSERT INTO qs_client_record (
                    client_id,
                    user_id,
                    deleted_at,
                    activity_time,
                    encrypted_push_token,
                    owner_public_key,
                    owner_signature_key,
                    ratchet
                )
                SELECT
                    client_id,
                    user_id,
                    NOW(),
                    NOW(),
                    NULL,
                    '\x',
                    '\x',
                    '\x'
                FROM deleted_client_record;
